title: BetterNameTags
body:
# BetterNameTags

BetterNameTags improves Minecraft player name rendering with clean, customizable 3D name tags and equipment display.

It replaces vanilla nametags with a modern, always-visible 3D overlay showing player names, health, and held/armor items.

The mod is client-side and works on any server without server-side required.

### ✨ Features
- Health display with color indication (green / yellow / red)
- Shows player equipment (armor + held items) 
- Smooth world-space rendering using camera billboarding 
- Item icons rendered directly in 3D space 

### 🧠 How it works
- Hooks into the client 3D render event
 
- Iterates all nearby players

- Renders:
  > Name + health text
  >
  > Armor + held items above the player
  >
  > Uses custom scaling based on camera distance
  >
  > Fully replaces vanilla nametag visuals
